baselines.code:
SETBG 15
SETPC 6
SETPW 2
PU
SETX 0
SETY -220
SETHEADING 90
PD

TO LEAFSPIRAL :X :Y :A :R :STEP :W :DEPTH
IF :DEPTH <= 0 [STOP]
PU
SETX :X
SETY :Y
SETHEADING :A
PD
SETPC (10 + (:DEPTH MOD 6))
SETPW :W
ARC 55 :R
RT 18
ARC 45 (:R * 0.78)
LT 34
ARC 38 (:R * 0.62)
RT 22
ARC 30 (:R * 0.5)
PU
FD :R * 0.75
PD
SETPC (2 + (:DEPTH MOD 8))
SETPW (:W * 0.65)
REPEAT 2 [ARC 60 (:R * 0.22) RT 120]
PU
BK :R * 0.35
PD
SETPC 13
SETPW 1
REPEAT 3 [FD :R * 0.18 RT 135 FD :R * 0.12 LT 90]
LEAFSPIRAL (:X + (:STEP * COS :A)) (:Y + (:STEP * SIN :A)) (:A + 17) (:R * 0.91) (:STEP * 1.03) (:W * 0.96) (:DEPTH - 1)
END

TO VINE :X :Y :A :R :N
IF :N <= 0 [STOP]
PU
SETX :X
SETY :Y
SETHEADING :A
PD
SETPC (3 + (:N MOD 9))
SETPW (1 + (:N / 8))
REPEAT 2 [ARC 90 :R RT 20 ARC 70 (:R * 0.72) LT 35]
PU
FD :R * 0.8
PD
SETPC (8 + (:N MOD 7))
SETPW 1
REPEAT 4 [FD :R * 0.16 RT 140 FD :R * 0.1 LT 100]
VINE (:X + ((:R * 1.1) * COS :A)) (:Y + ((:R * 1.1) * SIN :A)) (:A + 11) (:R * 0.94) (:N - 1)
END

TO BLOOM :X :Y :S :C
PU
SETX :X
SETY :Y
SETHEADING 90
PD
SETPW 2
SETPC :C
REPEAT 8 [
ARC 40 :S
RT 135
ARC 40 (:S * 0.7)
LT 90
]
PU
SETX :X
SETY :Y
PD
SETPC 14
CIRCLE (:S * 0.22)
PU
SETX :X
SETY :Y
SETHEADING 0
PD
SETPC 9
REPEAT 6 [
FD :S * 0.34
BK :S * 0.16
RT 60
]
END
